scripts.setup: bun install && ln -s "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/cli/.env" apps/cli/.env && ln -s "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/navigator/.env" apps/navigator/.env && ln -s "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/packages/healing/.env" packages/healing/.env && ln -s "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/api/.dev.vars" apps/api/.dev.vars
